tasks.title: Audit all routes, pages, page headers, navigation, layout wrappers, color usage, modern design consistency, and extension UI
tasks.description: Perform a comprehensive audit of the entire IELTS Journey codebase focusing on routes, pages, page headers, navigation menus, layout wrappers, color usage, design consistency, and extension UI components. Document all inconsistencies, broken CSS, duplicate pages, missing icons, noisy color usage, outdated UI patterns, and UI-only features. Produce a detailed audit report listing all findings with file references and screenshots if applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit report lists all inconsistent designs, broken CSS, duplicate pages, missing icons, noisy color usage, outdated UI patterns, and UI-only features
Audit covers both website and extension UI
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed audit report identifying all UI/UX inconsistencies, bugs, duplicates, missing icons, color issues, and outdated patterns across the app and extension

outputPlan.description: Comprehensive audit report of UI/UX inconsistencies and issues

metadata.inputContext: Project source code, existing UI and extension components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear understanding of all UI/UX issues to be fixed in subsequent tasks

tasks.title: Fix shared layout and container system for consistent page width and no overflow
tasks.description: Refactor and standardize all page layout containers and wrappers across the app and extension. Create or improve shared layout components such as AppShell, PageShell, PageContainer, PageHeader, PageSection, ContentGrid, DashboardGrid, and MobilePageShell. Ensure consistent max width, padding, margin, and no horizontal overflow on all screen sizes. Specifically fix Today Plan page container width and chat message container width issues. Remove any custom random containers and replace with shared components.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages use shared layout components consistently
No horizontal scroll or content overflow on any page or extension popup
Today Plan page container width is fixed and consistent with other pages
Chat message container width and wrapping issues are resolved
tasks.expectedResult: Consistent page layout and container system with fixed width issues and no overflow across all pages and extension UI

outputPlan.description: Shared layout components refactored or created
Today Plan page container width fixed
Chat message container width and wrapping fixed
Extension popup layout fixed for no overflow

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying layout and container issues
evidence: files modified with consistent layout components
no horizontal scroll on tested pages
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Establishes a consistent and bug-free layout foundation for all pages and extension UI

tasks.title: Create or improve shared PageTitleWithIcon component and semantic icon mapping
tasks.description: Develop a reusable PageTitleWithIcon component supporting icon, title, description, primary and secondary actions, breadcrumbs, badges, and responsive layout with consistent spacing, icon size, color, and alignment. Refactor all pages to use this component for their page headers. Create or improve a centralized semantic icon mapping using lucide-react icons with project-specific Icon* exports. Ensure all icons are imported from the shared icon map and no direct lucide-react imports remain. Provide semantic icons such as MistakeReviewIcon, AITutorIcon, VocabularyIcon, etc. Document usage guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: PageTitleWithIcon component supports all required props and responsive behavior
All main pages use PageTitleWithIcon for their page headers
Semantic icon mapping is centralized and used consistently
No direct lucide-react imports in app or extension code
Mistake Review page uses MistakeReviewIcon in header
tasks.expectedResult: Consistent page title headers with icons across all pages using shared component and icon system

outputPlan.description: Reusable page title with icon component
Centralized semantic icon mapping using lucide-react
Mistake Review page header uses MistakeReviewIcon
All main pages refactored to use PageTitleWithIcon component

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying missing icons and inconsistent page headers, existing icon usage
evidence: Mistake Review page header includes icon
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides consistent, modern, and accessible page headers with icons across the app

tasks.title: Clean up color usage and reduce visual noise across all pages and extension UI
tasks.description: Audit and refactor color usage to remove noisy, overly colorful backgrounds, badges, icons, and cards. Use the shared theme tokens for colors, spacing, border radius, shadows, and font sizes. Ensure color palette is clean, balanced, calm, professional, and consistent. Use accent colors only for meaningful UI elements such as primary actions, skill labels, progress indicators, and AI Tutor highlights. Replace saturated card backgrounds with neutral or soft backgrounds. Reduce random gradients and bright colors. Update Vocabulary Notebook list items to use subtle accent colors and calm styling. Document color usage guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette is consistent, balanced, and calm across all pages and extension UI
No page or component uses overly saturated or noisy colors
Vocabulary Notebook list items are visually calm and readable
All colors use theme tokens, no random hex or inline styles
Visual noise from badges, icons, and cards is reduced
tasks.expectedResult: Modern, clean, and balanced color usage with reduced visual noise and consistent theme token usage

outputPlan.description: Vocabulary Notebook list item styling cleaned and simplified
Cards updated to use neutral or soft backgrounds and theme colors
Badges updated to use subtle accent colors
Theme tokens audited and used consistently
Extension UI colors cleaned and balanced

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying color overuse and noisy UI
evidence: files modified with cleaned color usage
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves visual polish and reduces distraction by cleaning color usage

tasks.title: Fix navigation active menu style and hamburger menu responsive behavior
tasks.description: Remove the leading border from active menu items and replace with a modern active state using soft background, stronger text and icon color, rounded pill or card background, and subtle shadow consistent with theme. Fix wrong active route state and inconsistent navigation item spacing and icon sizes. Add missing navigation icons using the shared semantic icon mapping. Fix hamburger menu button to only display on mobile or small screens, hide on desktop. Ensure menu open/close state works correctly, overlay or drawer does not break page scroll, and mobile/desktop menu behavior is correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Active menu items have no leading border and use modern active style
Navigation icons are consistent and present for all menu items
Hamburger menu button only shows on mobile or small screens
Menu open/close state works correctly without breaking page scroll
Mobile and desktop menu behaviors are correct and consistent
tasks.expectedResult: Modern, clean navigation with correct active states and responsive hamburger menu behavior

outputPlan.description: Sidebar navigation active menu style fixed and icons added
Hamburger menu button responsive behavior fixed
Navigation active route state fixed

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying navigation and menu issues
evidence: hamburger menu shows only on mobile
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves navigation usability and visual consistency

tasks.title: Merge or remove duplicate Listening Practice UI, cards, and routes
tasks.description: Identify all duplicate Listening Practice pages, cards, and routes. Remove or merge duplicates to keep only one clear Listening Practice entry. Refactor practice cards for Reading, Listening, Writing, Speaking, Grammar, and Vocabulary to have unique titles, clear descriptions, beautiful icons from semantic icon mapping, skill colors consistent with theme, working actions, no fake buttons, balanced color usage, and modern card style. Update navigation and routes accordingly to remove duplicates.
acceptanceCriteria: Only one Listening Practice page and route exists
Practice cards are consistent and unique for each skill
No fake buttons or duplicate content in practice cards
Navigation updated to reflect merged practice pages
tasks.expectedResult: Cleaned practice pages and cards with no duplicates and consistent design

outputPlan.description: Listening Practice page merged and cleaned
Duplicate Listening Practice page removed
Practice cards refactored for consistency and uniqueness
Routes updated to remove duplicates

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying duplicate Listening Practice UI and routes
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes confusion and clutter by eliminating duplicate practice pages and cards

tasks.title: Replace progress review page with main progress page and merge AI Progress Review content
tasks.description: Remove the separate progress review page and merge its useful AI Progress Review content into the main Progress page. Update the Progress page to include learning progress overview, skill progress, study time, vocabulary progress, mistake trends, study plan completion, AI progress review section, period selector, generate AI review action, and review history if available. Remove duplicate navigation entries if any. Redirect old progress review route to the main progress page. Ensure all progress related features work and are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Separate progress review page is removed
Main Progress page includes all AI Progress Review content
Navigation has no duplicate progress entries
Old progress review route redirects to main progress page
Progress page features work correctly
tasks.expectedResult: Unified Progress page with merged AI review content and no duplicate progress pages or routes

outputPlan.description: Separate progress review page removed
Main Progress page updated with AI Progress Review content and features
Navigation updated to remove duplicate progress entries and add redirect
Redirect from old progress review route to main progress page added

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying duplicate progress pages and AI review content
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Simplifies progress tracking by unifying progress pages and features

tasks.title: Complete full AI Tutor page with polished chat UI and functionality
tasks.description: Complete the AI Tutor page with full page chat layout including clear page header with AI Tutor icon, AI Tutor identity avatar or icon, chat history area with user and AI message styles, suggested prompt chips, context cards, input composer with send button, loading state, empty state, error state with retry action, missing AI config state, chat history persistence if available, mobile friendly chat layout, and modern chat UI with good spacing and readable bubbles. Fix chat container width and wrapping issues to prevent overflow. Ensure accessibility and responsive behavior. Remove any transparent or hard to see AI chat buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: AI Tutor page has full chat UI with all required features
Chat container width and wrapping issues fixed
AI chat button is visible, modern, and accessible
Chat input works on mobile and desktop
Loading, empty, error, and retry states implemented
Chat history persists if available
tasks.expectedResult: Fully functional and polished AI Tutor page with modern chat UI and fixed layout issues

outputPlan.description: AI Tutor page completed with full chat layout and features
Chat container width and wrapping fixed
Chat input composer improved for accessibility and responsiveness
AI chat button styled to be visible, modern, and accessible

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying AI Tutor page incompleteness and chat UI issues
evidence: AI chat button visible and styled
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Delivers a polished, fully functional AI Tutor feature critical to user engagement

tasks.title: Add word family dropdown to Vocabulary Notebook items and simplify list item styling
tasks.description: Refactor Vocabulary Notebook list items to use cleaner, less noisy styling with subtle accent colors and calm card backgrounds. Add a dropdown or expandable section to show word family data including noun, verb, adjective, adverb forms, related forms, and example usage if available. Dropdown is collapsed by default, expands on click with smooth transition, accessible button state, mobile friendly, and does not break list layout. If word family data is missing, show 'No word family data yet' or provide a Generate with AI action if AI enrichment exists. Remove any fake word family data.
acceptanceCriteria: Vocabulary Notebook list items have simplified, calm styling
Word family dropdown exists and works correctly
Dropdown is accessible and mobile friendly
Missing word family data shows appropriate message or AI generate action
No fake word family data displayed
tasks.expectedResult: Vocabulary Notebook with clean list items and functional word family dropdown

outputPlan.description: Vocabulary list item styling simplified and word family dropdown added
New or improved word family dropdown component

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying Vocabulary Notebook styling and missing word family UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances Vocabulary Notebook usability and completeness with word family details

tasks.title: Fix line break and text wrapping issues across all UI elements
tasks.description: Audit and fix all text wrapping and line break issues in page titles, descriptions, card titles, AI messages, vocabulary meanings, practice descriptions, buttons, badges, navigation labels, empty states, and error messages. Apply proper CSS utilities or classes for word-break, overflow-wrap, min-width zero, max-width, line clamp where appropriate, and responsive text sizes. Ensure no important content is hidden incorrectly and no layout breaks occur due to long words or URLs. Test on all screen sizes for responsive text layout.
acceptanceCriteria: No text overflow or broken line breaks anywhere in the UI
Long words and URLs wrap correctly without breaking layout
Buttons and badges do not wrap badly
Mobile text layout is correct and readable
CSS fixes use theme tokens and utilities
tasks.expectedResult: All text wrapping and line break issues fixed with responsive and accessible text layout

outputPlan.description: Text wrapping and line break CSS fixes applied
Extension UI text wrapping fixes applied

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying text wrapping and line break issues
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves readability and layout stability across all UI text elements

tasks.title: Restore missing functionality and remove or disable fake UI elements
tasks.description: Audit all visible buttons, cards, links, and actions to identify missing or broken functionality. Fix buttons with no handlers, links pointing to hashes, UI cards not connected to real data, mock or demo data used in production, AI buttons not connected to AI service, forms not saving, settings not persisting, study plan actions not working, vocabulary actions not working, extension actions not working, navigation going to missing routes, and disabled states missing explanation. Remove any fake UI or clearly disable with explanation. Ensure every visible feature either works correctly or is disabled with clear explanation.
acceptanceCriteria: All visible buttons and actions work or are disabled with explanation
No fake UI elements remain
Forms save and settings persist correctly
Navigation routes are valid and working
Extension features work correctly or are disabled with explanation
tasks.expectedResult: All features restored or properly disabled, no fake UI, fully functional website and extension

outputPlan.description: Fix handlers and connect UI to real data
Fix forms and settings persistence
Fix extension UI and actions
Fix navigation routes

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying missing functionality and fake UI
evidence: all features work or disabled with explanation
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the app and extension are fully functional and free of misleading UI

tasks.title: Fix extension popup UI and selected text menu functionality
tasks.description: Audit and fix the extension popup to open correctly with a compact, modern, and polished layout that does not overflow. Fix logged out state UI. Ensure vocabulary list and detail views work correctly. Fix pronunciation button, AI Tutor shortcut, selected text menu, save vocabulary, save selected text, explain selected text, simplify selected text, and save article features. Ensure auto highlight saved words works safely without duplicate injected UI or host website layout break. Fix hamburger or menu behavior so it does not affect extension incorrectly. Clean extension colors to be balanced and not visually noisy.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension popup opens and displays correctly without overflow
All extension features work as expected
No duplicate injected UI or CSS leakage
Extension colors are clean and balanced
Hamburger/menu behavior does not break extension UI
tasks.expectedResult: Fully functional and polished extension popup and selected text menu with no UI or CSS issues

outputPlan.description: Extension popup UI fixed for layout and overflow
Selected text menu functionality fixed
Vocabulary list and detail fixed
Pronunciation button fixed
AI Tutor shortcut fixed

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying extension UI and functionality issues
evidence: no CSS leakage or duplicate UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the browser extension is polished, functional, and visually consistent

tasks.title: Audit theme tokens and remove random hard coded CSS
tasks.description: Audit all CSS and styles across the app and extension to identify random hard coded colors, pixel values, inline styles, one-off classes, and duplicate component styles. Refactor styles to use shared theme tokens for colors, spacing, border radius, shadows, font sizes, breakpoints, and z-index. Remove global CSS that breaks extension or pages. Consolidate scattered utility classes into shared components or theme tokens. Ensure no random hex colors or inline styles remain. Document theme token usage guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: No random hard coded CSS or inline styles remain
All colors and spacing use theme tokens
No global CSS breaks extension or pages
Styles are consolidated and consistent
Theme token usage documented
tasks.expectedResult: Clean, maintainable CSS using theme tokens with no random hard coded styles

outputPlan.description: CSS refactored to use theme tokens and remove hard coded styles
Extension CSS cleaned and tokenized
Theme tokens audited and documented

metadata.inputContext: Audit report identifying random CSS and style issues
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves maintainability and consistency of styles across the project

tasks.title: Test desktop, mobile, and extension flows for responsiveness and UI consistency
tasks.description: Perform thorough testing of the entire app and extension on multiple screen sizes: mobile small, mobile large, tablet, laptop, desktop, and extension popup size. Verify no horizontal scroll, no card overflow, no text overflow, no broken chat layout, no clipped dropdowns, no broken modal or drawer. Confirm hamburger menu only appears at correct breakpoints. Confirm bottom navigation works if available. Confirm desktop navigation is clean. Confirm Today Plan width is fixed. Confirm AI Tutor chat container is fixed. Confirm page titles with icons look correct on all screens. Confirm color usage remains balanced on all screen sizes. Confirm modern style remains consistent across pages. Document any issues found.
acceptanceCriteria: No horizontal scroll or overflow on any tested screen size
All UI components render correctly and consistently
Navigation and menus behave correctly on all screen sizes
Color usage is balanced and consistent
No broken layouts or clipped elements
Test report documents results and any issues
tasks.expectedResult: Verified responsive and consistent UI across all devices and extension popup

outputPlan.description: Responsive UI test report documenting results and issues

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the app and extension UI are responsive and consistent across devices

tasks.title: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build for final validation
tasks.description: Run the full typecheck, lint, test, and build commands to validate code quality and correctness after all fixes and refactors. Ensure no TypeScript errors, no lint warnings or errors, all tests pass, and the project builds successfully. Document any issues and fix if necessary before final delivery.
acceptanceCriteria: Typecheck passes with no errors
Lint passes with no warnings or errors
All tests pass
Project builds successfully
tasks.expectedResult: Codebase is clean, correct, and production ready with no errors or warnings

metadata.inputContext: All previous fixes and refactors completed
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms the project is production ready with high code quality

tasks.title: Return final report summarizing all fixes, improvements, and remaining issues
tasks.description: Compile a clear and comprehensive final report summarizing all inconsistent design issues found, outdated UI issues found, modern style improvements made, missing page title icons found and fixed, Mistake Review icon fix details, color overuse issues found and cleaned, CSS and container bugs fixed, Today Plan width fix details, duplicate Listening Practice fix details, Progress page merge or replacement details, active menu style fix, hamburger menu fix, AI Tutor page completion details, AI chat button fix details, chat container fix details, Vocabulary Notebook design changes, word family dropdown implementation, missing features restored, fake UI removed or disabled, extension fixes, files changed, components refactored or created, tests performed, and any remaining known issues. Provide this report as a markdown file in docs/final-ui-ux-redesign-report.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Final report covers all required topics comprehensively
Report is clear, well structured, and actionable
Report file is created at docs/final-ui-ux-redesign-report.md
tasks.expectedResult: Final comprehensive UI/UX redesign report created

outputPlan.description: Comprehensive final report of all redesign work and results

metadata.inputContext: All previous audit, fix, and validation results
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear summary and documentation of the entire redesign effort
